body_txt: After a particularly strange or squicky phenomenon, a character will inevitably say, "That's disturbing", "That's just wrong", " That's wrong on so many levels ", or something similar. The next level up has characters requesting the Brain Bleach . May lead into or combine with Screaming at Squick . For extra comedy this may be followed up with " But I can't look away ..." Contrast with ...And That Would Be Wrong , where they may not think so, but they want others to think they do.
